wordplay_note: A juvenile demiurge feeding on the dead
card_description: Jory Miller (meaning "Jory = farmer / earthworker") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Ubik*. Malevolent half-life entity who constructs false realities and consumes other half-lifers. Name note: A juvenile demiurge feeding on the dead. The demiurge as adolescent tyrant — PKD's gnostic theme of a petty creator-god. First appears in *Ubik*.

reference.brief: Malevolent half-life entity who constructs false realities and consumes other half-lifers
reference.significance: The demiurge as adolescent tyrant — PKD's gnostic theme of a petty creator-god
